ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., KEX) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent company (for subsidiary relationships) */,
  "is_delisted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stock is delisted */,
  "delist_date" TEXT /* Date of delisting (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_parent_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_company_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "trading_volume" TEXT /* Total trading volume */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions (e.g., 'view, download, edit') */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_sectors" (
  "exchange_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange-sector pair */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_sectors_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_sectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_industries" (
  "exchange_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange-industry pair */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_industries_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "related_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related company */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, subsidiary, merger) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_relationships_related_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_company_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_relationships_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
